snippet.title: Dani Mocanu ūüēäÔłŹ Omul fara tine este pierdut | Official Video
snippet.description:

Toate drepturile rezervate artistului ¬© & ¬ģ Dani Mocanu
Versurile acestei melodii le regasiti jos in descriere

Strofa 1 :
Nu ma compar deloc cu tine Doamne
In mine ca om am multa rautate
Daia incerc de la o zi la alta
Sa las raul deoparte sa iau bunatatea
Si promisiunea mea fata de tine
Asa va fi ca doar asa imi va fi bine
Nu mai vreau sa mai fac nimic lumesc
Dragoste in tine sa gasesc

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

Strofa 2 :
In mine a intrat un duh curat
Toata lumea imi spune ce mult m-am schimbat
Si vreau sa-ti urmez calea pana la sfarsit
Iti multumesc Doamne ca tu m-ai ocrotit
Vreau sa fii umbra mea mereu sa fii cu mine
Ca doar langa tine Domnul meu imi e bine
In tine am toata baza si-ncrederea
Ca lumea din jurul meu e rea

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Lyrics:
I‚Äôm on an island
Even when you‚Äôre close
Can‚Äôt take the silence
I‚Äôd rather be alone
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won‚Äôt be a burden if we both don‚Äôt hold a grudge

We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

Now you‚Äôre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don‚Äôt give me that look just say we‚Äôre good

So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Veselie cu Victoria si Bogdan Bizau - Colaj Maramures 2021
snippet.description:
In ciuda vremurilor pe care  le traim, musai sa ne mai descretim un pic fruntile, asa ca va oferim un Colaj nou de Maramures pregatit cu tot dragul pentru voi.
Multumirile se indreapta catre prietenii nostri dragi care de fiecare data sunt alaturi de noi.
Studio: Ionuc de la Sighet
Vioara: Bogdan Bizau
Cantecele din acest colaj apartin urmatorilor artisti:
1.Fratii Petreus-Am o tipa cu tutun
2.Victoria Bizau-Tine-mi doamne zilele(linie melodica si text:Ioana Bizau)
3.Victoria Bizau-Ceterasule de frunte(linie melodica:Bogdan Bizau, text :Ioana Bizau)

Contact artisti:
Bogdan Bizau 0746.803.531
Victoria Bizau: 0751.463.455/001(847) 532-1714 SUA

Simt ca timpul trece mult prea usor

Nu conteaza ce imbraci
Conteaza doar ce-mi faci

Guez lucy trapdoctorz

snippet.title: Zapada, gheata si mult frig - CEL MAI FRUMOS DRUM DIN ROMANIA
snippet.description:
Bicicletele din clip: https://www.sportguru.ro/sporturi/ciclism/biciclete/biciclete-e-bike-hybrid

Drumul dintre Comarnic si Campina prin Secaria si Tesila este absolut incredibil. Indiferent cu ce mergi. Cu masina, pe jos, cu bicicleta. In plus, in orice anotimp arata bine. Desigur, vara, cand totul este verde si plin de viata lucrurile sunt si mai frumoase, dar, noi ne-am incapatanat sa il vizitam iarna. 
Este un drum de dificultate medie, clar pentru cineva antrenat pentru ca prezinta multe uracari si curbe in ac de par in care vii cu viteza de peste 60km/h daca nu apesi franele. Din localitatea Tesila, daca faci stanga si lasi in urma Campina te poti indrepta prin munti catre Sacele. Desi multe camping-uri in acea zona, mare atentie pentru ca acea zona este frecventata de ursi. 

Canalul lui SebiPOV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpuvNQ0ttUgIVU3dHikjbUQ

Link traseu: https://www.google.ro/maps/dir/C%C3%A2mpina,+105600/Comarnic/@45.2122453,25.6665932,12.25z/data=!4m19!4m18!1m10!1m1!1s0x40b3007e06e471ab:0x8d24be2ca6c16a32!2m2!1d25.742141!2d45.1369957!3m4!1m2!1d25.7289158!2d45.2782084!3s0x40b30f3e1ffd3827:0x5a0bc1357da0c807!1m5!1m1!1s0x40b30511796cf921:0xd3b44c9f28af3486!2m2!1d25.6408029!2d45.2488709!3e2?hl=ro

Ma poti urmari si pe Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bucharestbiketraffic/

De unde imi cumpar trotinetele electrice: https://www.evomag.ro/sport-fitness-vehicule-electrice-trotinete-electrice/

Ma poti contacta aici : bucharestbikeprojects@gmail.com 

Pe TikTok sunt aici: https://www.tiktok.com/@bucharestbiketraffic?

Music by Epidemic Sound (http://www.epidemicsound.com)

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

snippet.title: Paste cu branza feta si rosii cherry la cuptor | JamilaCuisine
snippet.description:
Paste cu branza feta si rosii cherry,  reteta care golit supermarketurile din Finlanda. Cel mai simplu si mai usor sos pentru paste, preparat doar in cuptor, fara prea multe ingrediente. E atat de gustos si de aromat incat va asigur ca-l veti face mereu.

snippet.title: 'I‚Äôm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

Claudia Puican - Doar o tinere»õe avem ( Videoclip Oficial )
AboneazńÉ-te la Claudia Puican: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtjFx3Wi8Z_cO5agH9sf2kQ?sub_confirmation=1
Dragii mei,
Cu emotie si entuziasm, va daruiesc aceasta melodie, care ma reprezinta cu adevarat. E o dorinta mai veche, de a va arata prin muzica radacinile mele de olteanca din Mehedinti, care astazi se indeplineste. Mi-as dori din suflet sa va placa acest proiect! ‚Ě§ Ma intorc in Mehedinti ‚Ě§
Va pup si va imbratisez cu drag!
